title: Listing Addressees — Both 'To:' and 'Distribution:' Line
plain_language_rule: When correspondence is addressed to a group, board, or committee by title, use the 'To:' line for the group title and the 'Distribution:' line for individual members. Type 'To:' in uppercase followed by a colon and the group title. Type 'Distribution:' on the second line below the last line of the text, followed by member names.
source_text: TBD - exact manual text required before activation
renderer_impact: Combines 'To:' and 'Distribution:' lines. 'To:' holds the group/board/committee title. 'Distribution:' is placed on the second line below the last line of text with individual member names below.
notes: This format applies when correspondence is sent to a group, board, or committee addressed by title. The 'To:' line carries the group title; 'Distribution:' lists individual members.
